sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Weibo to Hold Annual General Meeting on May 27, 2026
feed.summary: Weibo Corporation announced it will hold its annual general meeting (AGM) on May 27, 2026, at 2:30 p.m. Hong Kong time in Hong Kong. Shareholders of Class A and Class B ordinary shares recorded by April 27, 2026, Hong Kong time, are eligible to vote. Holders of American Depositary Shares (ADSs) by April 27, 2026, New York time, must provide voting instructions to JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.

feed.title: The Best Reservation in Town is Now at Home with All-New Kraft Mac & Cheese Restaurant Edition
feed.summary: Kraft Mac & Cheese is launching a new "Restaurant Edition" line, offering elevated, restaurant-style mac and cheese flavors for at-home consumption. This new range aims to provide sophisticated meal options without the high cost or time commitment of dining out, featuring premium cheeses, new pasta varieties, and flavors like Parmesan Pesto, Romano Cacio e Pepe, and Monterey Jack Caramelized Onion. Each box offers 30% more food than the classic blue box, designed to be affordable and convenient for families.
